item19_detail.verbatim_refusal: We do not make any representations about a franchisee's future financial performance or the past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets. We also do not authorize our employees or representatives to make any such representations either orally or in writing.
item19_detail.substantiation_availability: If purchasing existing outlet, actual records may be provided. Report unauthorized FPR to William Fortier, SVP Development Americas, FTC, and state agencies.

item21_structural_facts.entity_type_for_tax: Disregarded entity (all income flows to Hilton Worldwide consolidated return)
item21_structural_facts.debt_guarantee: Unconditionally guarantees certain Hilton debt maturing 2025-2033; all assets and franchise contracts pledged
item21_structural_facts.graduate_acquisition: $85.3M franchise contract intangible assets acquired May 2024 (15-year useful life)
item21_structural_facts.related_party_structure: Intercompany balances managed through Hilton centralized cash management; periodic settlement via distributions

item1_structural_facts.previous_parent: Park Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (spun off January 4, 2017)
item1_structural_facts.brand_count_in_portfolio: 20+ brands (Hilton, Canopy, Conrad, Curio, DoubleTree, Embassy, Graduate, Hampton, Hilton Garden Inn, Home2, Homewood, LivSmart Studios, LXR, Motto, NoMad, Signia, Spark, Tapestry, Tempo, Tru, Waldorf Astoria)
item1_structural_facts.restaurant_brands_program: StiR Creative Collective — optional F&B licensing program launched 2024

item6_fee_attributes.liquidated_damages_formula: System or Hotel Average Monthly Royalty × up to 60 months depending on timing
